headline: Why Broadridge (BR) Shares Are Falling Today
summary: Shares of financial technology provider Broadridge (NYSE:BR) fell 4.3% in the afternoon session after a wave of analyst price target cuts and notable insider selling soured investor sentiment, pushing the stock to a new low for the previous 52 weeks.

headline: Tuesday's session: gap up and gap down stock in the S&P500 index
